page_title: Jarvi Nursery | Premium Guava Saplings — Gujarat
hero_description: For 14+ years, farmers across India have trusted Jarvi for guava saplings built for real fields, real soil, and real income. Deep red pulp, heavy fruit, premium market price — every season.
hero_card_title: Grown for the field, not the greenhouse.
hero_feature3: Fruiting in 8–12 months, up to 3 harvests/year
hero_feature4: Grown in Bharuch, Gujarat — adapted to Indian soil
varieties_description: Four guava lines, each grafted for a different orchard goal — colour, density, sweetness, or scale.
variety1_description: Our flagship pink-flesh guava. Bestseller, in stock.
variety2_description: Improved high-density variant of Jarvi Red.
variety3_description: Premium grade — bigger fruit, richer colour.
variety4_description: Sweet white-flesh guava with a honey-like aroma.
footer_description: Guava saplings grown for real fields, real soil, and real income.
hero_desc_intro: Fill in the order form below.
hero_desc_check1: You will receive an SMS confirmation.
hero_desc_check2: Jarvi Nursery will instantly receive your order notification.
order_card_subtitle: Please provide accurate details so we can process your order quickly.
note_2: Your order is confirmed only after verification by our team.
note_3: You will receive an SMS confirmation after submission.
note_4: Our team will contact you regarding delivery and payment.
payment_description: Please make the payment to the account below and then place your order. Our team will contact you to confirm the payment and process your order.
why_subtitle: Trusted Quality • Healthy Plants • Expert Guidance
feature1_desc: Every plant is carefully grown and inspected to ensure healthy roots and strong growth.
feature2_desc: Plants are packed securely and delivered with maximum care to maintain freshness.
feature3_desc: Our experts provide guidance on plantation, maintenance, irrigation and farming practices.
feature4_desc: High-yield varieties selected for better production and long-term profitability.
